zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauntleroy是John Fauntleroy的女兒，於1467年出生在英國多瑟特馬爾申武德。她於大約1480年與Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1541年6月1日在英國維爾爾斯圖頓享年74歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauntleroy是John Fauntleroy的女儿，于1467年出生在英国多瑟特馬爾申武德。她于大约1480年与Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1541年6月1日在英国維爾爾斯圖頓享年74岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fauntleroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old French phrase enfant le roi ‘son of the king’, denoting a royal prince and, as a surname, a member of a royal prince's household.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauntleroy was born in 1467, in Marshwood, Dorset, England as the daughter of John Fauntleroy. She married Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton about 1480, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 1 June 1541, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauntleroy est née en 1467, à Marshwood, Dorset, Angleterre, fille de John Fauntleroy. Elle a épousé Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton environ 1480, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 juin 1541, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauntleroy wurde 1467 in Marshwood, Dorset, England, als Tochter von John Fauntleroy geboren. Sie hat um 1480 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Juni 1541 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Stourton, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauntleroy è nata il nel 1467 nel Marshwood, Dorset, England come figlia di John Fauntleroy. Lei sposato Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton circa 1480, nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1541, nel Stourton, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauntleroyは1467年にイギリスドールセトマーシュウッドでJohn Fauntleroyの娘として生まれた。約1480年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンでSir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1541年6月1日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで74歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauntleroy(은)는 1467년 영국 도르세트 마스h우드에서 John Fauntleroy의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1541년 6월 1일 영국 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauntleroy nasceu em 1467, em Marshwood, Dorset, Inglaterra filha de John Fauntleroy. Ela casou-se com Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton aproximadamente 1480, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1 de junho de 1541, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauntleroy родилась в 1467 г. в местности маршвуд, дорсет, Англия. Её отца звали John Fauntleroy. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton около 1480 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 1 июня 1541 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes Fauntleroy nació en 1467, en Marshwood, Dorset, Inglaterra como hija de John Fauntleroy. Se casó con Sir Edward Stourton 6th baronet stourton aproximadamente 1480, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1541, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
